posts.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
posts.summary: Salesforce on Tuesday launched an entirely rebuilt version of Slackbot , the company's workplace assistant, transforming it from a simple notification tool into what executives describe as a fully powered AI agent capable of searching enterprise data, drafting documents, and taking action on behalf of employees. The new Slackbot, now generally available to Business+ and Enterprise+ customers, is Salesforce's most aggressive move yet to position Slack at the center of the emerging "agentic AI" movement — where software agents work alongside humans to complete complex tasks.…
posts.author: michael.nunez@venturebeat.com (Michael Nuñez)
